actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (fileID 515040909) on Floor maps to script IfPuzzle (guid a4fe0afa74eee4b4d9b3c22a64e1dc6b). IfPuzzle subscribes to XRSocketInteractor.selectEntered to run ObjectSnapped. To test this, an IXRSelectInteractable must be snapped into Floor’s XRSocketInteractor. If the snapped object's transform.name equals correctPiece.name, IfPuzzle calls linkedIfManager.correctPiece(). In the provided scene meta, correctPiece and linkedIfManager are unassigned (fileID 0), so this path will currently produce a NullReferenceException. Please provide/assign a valid correctPiece Transform and a valid ifManager instance so we can complete this test.

MonoBehaviour_0 (fileID 515040909) on Floor maps to script IfPuzzle (guid a4fe0afa74eee4b4d9b3c22a64e1dc6b). IfPuzzle subscribes to XRSocketInteractor.selectExited to run ObjectRemoved. To test this, remove the snapped IXRSelectInteractable from Floor’s XRSocketInteractor. This calls linkedIfManager.removedPiece(). In the provided scene meta, linkedIfManager is unassigned (fileID 0), so this path will currently produce a NullReferenceException. Please provide/assign a valid ifManager instance so we can complete this test.
